TCASE470_TCASE470_008532_00.03.01.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 79A
Recv ID: 4B3
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: EA
Func Name: TCASE

    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "2222",
    "version": "0000"
